title: The Admiralty (Jurisdiction and Settlement of Maritime Claims) Act, 2017
full_text: The Admiralty (Jurisdiction and Settlement of Maritime Claims) Act, 2017 नावधिकरण (समुद्री दावा की अधिकारिता और निपटारा) अधिनियम,2017 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201722 Act Number: 22 Enactment Date: 2017-08-09 Act Year: 2017 Short Title: The Admiralty (Jurisdiction and Settlement of Maritime Claims) Act, 2017 Hindi Title: नावधिकरण (समुद्री दावा की अधिकारिता और निपटारा) अधिनियम,2017 Long Title: An Act to consolidate the laws relating to admiralty jurisdiction, legal proceedings in connection with vessels, their arrest, detention, sale and other matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Shipping Enforcement Date: 1-4-2018 Notification: S.O. 767(E) Part-II s. 3(ii) 22-2-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Admiralty (Jurisdiction and Settlement of Maritime Claims) Act, 2017 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ADMIRALTY JURISDICTION AND MARITIME CLAIMS CHAPTER III PROCEDURE AND APPEALS CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, application and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Admiralty jurisdiction. Section 4. Maritime claim. Section 5. Arrest of vessel in rem. Section 6. Admiralty jurisdiction in personam. Section 7. Restrictions on actions in personam in certain cases. Section 8. Vesting of rights on sale of vessels. Section 9. Inter se priority on maritime lien. Section 10. Order of priority of maritime claims. Section 11. Protection of owner, demise charterer, manager or operator or crew of vessel arrested. Section 12. Application of Code of Civil Procedure. Section 13. Assistance of assessors. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Appeal. Section 15. Transfer of proceedings by Supreme Court. Section 16. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Repeal and savings. Section 18. Power to remove difficulties.
